title: TAGH Instance Manifest (v1)
description: Project-owned declarative manifest at .tagh/instance.yml. Declares which service in the project's compose stack receives platform-managed ingress, which ports map to web/HMR/IDE roles, which commands to run after boot, and which env vars the platform should inject.

apiVersion.description: Schema version. v1 is the only shape understood by the v1 platform release.

kind.description: Document kind. Reserved for future kinds (e.g. Project).

compose.description: Path inside the project repo to the substrate compose file. Resolved relative to the repo root.

primary_service.description: Service name in the substrate compose that receives ingress + boot commands. Must match a services.<name> key in the substrate.

items.description: Shell command run inside primary_service after compose-up succeeds and the service is healthy.

required.description: Env-var names that must resolve in the container at compose-up time. Platform refuses to provision if any required name is missing from both the substrate's `environment:` and the manifest's `env.inherit`.

inherit.description: Env-var names the platform exports into the parent process so the substrate's list-form `environment: - NAME` resolves them at compose-up.

service.description: Service name in the substrate compose. Conventionally matches primary_service for the web role.

port.description: Container port that handles this ingress role.
